programme.title: Gen_
programme.desc: A doctor at a Milan hospital defies government and corporate greed to uphold his oath as a doctor. 2025. France, Switzerland, Italy. Director: Gianluca Matarrese.

programme.title: The White Ribbon
programme.desc: A series of attacks on upperclass townsfolk triggers an inquiry with no credible suspects. 2008. Germany, Austria. Director: Michael Haneke. Starring: Christian Friedel, Ernst Jacobi.

programme.title: LaRoy, Texas
programme.desc: Ray's plan to end his life is halted when he is given a mysterious envelope of cash, mistaken for a dangerous hitman. 2023. USA. Director: Shane Atkinson. Starring: Steve Zahn, John Magaro.

programme.title: Memento
programme.desc: A man left battling anterograde amnesia uses notes and tattoos to hunt down the man who murdered his wife. 2000. United States. Director: Christopher Nolan. Starring: Guy Pearce, Carrie-Anne Moss.

programme.title: Cleo From 5 to 7
programme.desc: On the streets of 1960's Paris a melodramatic pop singer is awaiting the results of a biopsy. 1962. France, Italy. Director: Agnes Varda. Starring: Corinne Marchand, Antoine Bourseiller.

programme.title: Mysterious Skin
programme.desc: Two young boys' childhood trauma leads them both down two different paths in life. 2004. United Kingdom, Netherlands. Director: Gregg Araki. Starring: Brady Corbet, Joseph Gordon-Levitt.

programme.title: Eames: The Architect And The Painter.
programme.desc: Charles and Ray Eames the couple that changed design forever. 2011. United States. Directors: Jason Cohn, Bill Jersey.

programme.title: LA Porta Rossa
programme.desc: 1/3. Filip again enters Vanessa's world. Paoletto wants news about Stella. 2023. Italy. Director: Gianpaolo Tescari. Starring: Lino Guanciale.

programme.title: LA Porta Rossa
programme.desc: 1/4. The past merges unhappily into the present in Cagliostro and Vanessa's investigation. 2023. Italy. Director: Gianpaolo Tescari. Starring: Lino Guanciale.

programme.title: Neneh Superstar
programme.desc: Despite her medical condition 12-year-old Neneh dreams of joining the Paris Opera Ballet. 2022. France. Director: Ramzi Ben Sliman. Starring: Oumy Bruni Garrel, Maiwenn.

programme.title: LaRoy, Texas
programme.desc: Ray's plan to end his life is halted when he is given a mysterious envelope of cash, mistaken for a dangerous hitman. 2023. USA. Director: Shane Atkinson. Starring: Steve Zahn, John Magaro.

programme.desc: A man left battling anterograde amnesia uses notes and tattoos to hunt down the man who murdered his wife. 2000. United States. Director: Christopher Nolan. Starring: Guy Pearce, Carrie-Anne Moss.

programme.title: The Divine Sarah Bernhardt
programme.desc: Sarah Bernhardt broke society's conventions, becoming the world's first star. 2024. France, Belgium. Director: Guillaume Nicloux. Starring: Sandrine Kiberlain, Laurent Lafitte.

programme.title: Two Tickets To Greece
programme.desc: Childhood friends reunite, and finally take their dream vacation to Greece. 2022. France. Director: Marc Fitoussi. Starring: Laure Calamy, Olivia Côte, Kristin Scott Thomas.

programme.title: Midas Man
programme.desc: Behind the man who changed music forever, remains something the world wasn't ready to see. 2024. United Kingdom. Director: Joe Stephenson. Starring: Jacob Fortune-Lloyd, Emily Watson.

programme.title: Twiggy
programme.desc: The life story of one of the world's greatest 'IT\" girls, from a working class childhood to the front cover, this is Twiggy. 2024. United Kingdom. Director: Sadie Frost.

programme.title: Totally F***ed Up
programme.desc: A group of alienated queer teenagers struggle to get along and complain about their lives together. 1993. United States. Director: Gregg Araki. Starring: James Duval, Roko Belic.

programme.title: Brown Vs. Brown
programme.desc: A dive into the work of late architect - Peter Mark-Brown. 2023. New Zealand. Director: Simon Mark-Brown.

programme.title: The Congregation
programme.desc: 2/1. The media's eyes are on Knutby after the murder. Eva's grip tightens around the congregation. 2024. Sweden. Director: Goran Kapetanovic. Starring: Aliette Opheim, Alexander Jubell.

programme.title: The Congregation
programme.desc: 2/2. Orjan climbs the congregate's ladder, landing him the role of Jesus in a Eva's musical. 2024. Sweden. Director: Goran Kapetanovic. Starring: Sara Alexandersson, Edvin Bredefeldt.

programme.title: The Congregation
programme.desc: 2/3. Orjan tells Lillian God wants her to give herself to him, and Peter's premonition shakes Knutby. 2024. Sweden. Director: Goran Kapetanovic. Starring: Sara Alexandersson, Davin Amini.

programme.title: The Congregation
